intro: Lepisorus pteropus, also known as the winged spleenwort, is a type of fern found in tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and small, sterile leaves. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage.
